content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch delta against the specified fork point, excluding `.ralph-burning/` runtime state. Found one functional blocker. Verification run: `nix develop -c cargo test bead_project_prompt_test`, `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check`, `nix develop -c cargo clippy -- -D warnings`, and `nix build` all passed in this checkout.

## Amendments

1. `src/contexts/bead_workflow/project_prompt.rs:92` deserializes `br dep tree <id> --json` directly into `DepTreeNode`, and `src/contexts/bead_workflow/project_prompt.rs:186` then expects the direct dependencies under a nested `children` field. Current `br dep tree --json` emits a top-level flat array of tree nodes with `depth`/`parent_id` metadata, not a single nested object; see https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust/blob/main/src/cli/commands/dep.rs#L988-L993. As a result, the real `BrAdapter` path will fail before rendering any prompt, while the tests only mock the incorrect nested shape. Add/adjust the dep-tree model to match the flat JSON output and derive direct blockers from depth/parent metadata, with an adapter-level test using the real flat shape.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: This breaks the core requirement that the renderer work from a bead id plus the live br graph; it only works with the mock shape used in tests.
